def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # ADV180: 180-day average of volume
    adv180 = rolling_mean(pl.col('volume'), window=180)

    # LHS base: vwap - rolling_min(vwap, ~16)
    vwap_min = rolling_min(pl.col('vwap'), window=16)
    lhs = pl.col('vwap') - vwap_min

    # RHS base: rolling_corr(vwap, adv180, ~18)
    rhs = rolling_corr(pl.col('vwap'), adv180, window=18)

    # Cross-sectional ranks
    rank_lhs = rank(lhs).over('date')
    rank_rhs = rank(rhs).over('date')

    # Boolean comparison → 1.0 / 0.0
    factor = pl.when(rank_lhs < rank_rhs).then(1.0).otherwise(0.0)

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
